mainEntity.name: How quickly can I set up my farm account?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most farmers can complete setup in under 5 minutes by creating an account, adding a farm, and registering their first pigs.

mainEntity.name: Can I import existing records from spreadsheets?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The Pigsty supports spreadsheet import so you can move from Excel to digital records faster.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a credit card to start?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. You can start on the free plan without a credit card and upgrade when needed.
You own your farm data. The platform processes it only to provide service functionality.
Use the website support channels such as email or WhatsApp and include your farm name plus issue details.
